current_work_package.description: Post-H9 debts are closed: too-old Last-Event-ID fails closed before SSE stream open, and JWKS cache-control/max-age parsing is implemented with local max TTL bounding.

active_controls: runtime behavior freeze unless separately authorized
connector refresh requires explicit operator intent
OAuth blocked until Streamable HTTP Phase A-F are green or explicitly waived
next_allowed_work: Explicit operator approval may authorize live connector refresh readiness check; otherwise no automatic live connector action is allowed
